statement: In every magma, Equation 724 (`x = y * (y * ((z * x) * y))`) implies Equation 2130 (`x = ((y * y) * x) * (z * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0011
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op z x) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y y) x) (op z x))
